claims.name: Gemma probe heldout r
claims.statement: A ridge probe on Gemma-3-27B residual-stream activations at the final prompt token (layer 32) predicts held-out Thurstonian utilities at Pearson r on a within-distribution eval split.

claims.name: Gemma probe cross-topic pooled r
claims.statement: Leave-one-topic-out pooled Pearson r for the Gemma-3-27B ridge probe (L32, tb-1): predictions from every fold's held-out topic are concatenated and correlated with true Thurstonian utilities.

claims.name: Gemma probe heldout uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Uniform-sample pairwise accuracy of the Gemma-3-27B ridge probe (L32) on the within-distribution held-out eval split.

claims.name: Gemma probe cross-topic uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Mean across 13 leave-one-topic-out folds of uniform-sample pairwise accuracy restricted to the held-out topic, for the Gemma-3-27B ridge probe (L32). Value carried over from an earlier pipeline run; the current hoo_summary.json lacks the per-fold uniform_hoo_acc field needed to recompute it here.
claims.source: manual: Gemma hoo_summary predates uniform_hoo_acc field; see paper/TODO_producers.md

claims.name: Qwen probe heldout r
claims.statement: A ridge probe on Qwen-3.5-122B residual-stream activations at the turn-boundary tb-1 token (layer 38) predicts held-out Thurstonian utilities at Pearson r on a within-distribution eval split.

claims.name: Qwen probe cross-topic pooled r
claims.statement: Leave-one-topic-out pooled Pearson r for the Qwen-3.5-122B ridge probe (L38, tb-1).

claims.name: Qwen probe heldout uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Uniform-sample pairwise accuracy of the Qwen-3.5-122B ridge probe (L38) on the within-distribution held-out eval split.

claims.name: Qwen probe cross-topic uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Mean across leave-one-topic-out folds of uniform-sample pairwise accuracy restricted to the held-out topic, for the Qwen-3.5-122B ridge probe (L38).

claims.name: Gemma content baseline heldout r
claims.statement: A Qwen3-Embedding-8B sentence-transformer content baseline, trained as a ridge probe on Gemma-3-27B Thurstonian utilities, evaluated on the within-distribution held-out eval split.

claims.name: Gemma content baseline cross-topic pooled r
claims.statement: Leave-one-topic-out pooled Pearson r for the Qwen3-Embedding-8B content baseline trained on Gemma utilities.

claims.name: Gemma content baseline heldout uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Uniform-sample pairwise accuracy of the Qwen3-Embedding-8B content baseline on the Gemma held-out eval split.

claims.name: Gemma content baseline cross-topic uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Mean across leave-one-topic-out folds of uniform-sample pairwise accuracy restricted to the held-out topic, for the Qwen3-Embedding-8B content baseline trained on Gemma utilities.

claims.name: Qwen content baseline heldout r
claims.statement: A Qwen3-Embedding-8B sentence-transformer content baseline trained on Qwen-3.5-122B Thurstonian utilities, evaluated on the within-distribution held-out eval split.

claims.name: Qwen content baseline cross-topic pooled r
claims.statement: Leave-one-topic-out pooled Pearson r for the Qwen3-Embedding-8B content baseline trained on Qwen utilities.

claims.name: Qwen content baseline heldout uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Uniform-sample pairwise accuracy of the Qwen3-Embedding-8B content baseline on the Qwen held-out eval split.

claims.name: Qwen content baseline cross-topic uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Mean across leave-one-topic-out folds of uniform-sample pairwise accuracy restricted to the held-out topic, for the Qwen3-Embedding-8B content baseline trained on Qwen utilities.
